meaning: n.远足,游览,短程旅行,远足队,离题,[物]偏移,漂移
examples: She felt more than usually hungry after her excursion.
Another pleasant excursion is Matamoros, 18 miles away.
To this day, Moto Guzzi makes a sport-touring Norge model in tribute to the excursion.
Turns out that he was supposed to go on an excursion and somehow wasn't accounted for.
